findings.evidence: Lines 76-78 prove `∀ n, ∫ θ in (0)..Real.pi, chebyshevCosine n θ * chebyshevCosine n θ = chebyshevTNormSq n`; lines 99-101 restate only the `n = 1` case.
findings.fix: Remove the low-degree lemma, or make it a private/example-style proof if it is only a sanity check; downstream users should specialize `integral_chebyshevCosine_mul_self 1`.
findings.issue: `integral_chebyshevCosine_one_mul_self` is a special-case duplicate of the already stated general diagonal theorem `integral_chebyshevCosine_mul_self`.

findings.evidence: Lines 83-84 prove `m ≠ n -> ∫ θ in (0)..Real.pi, chebyshevCosine m θ * chebyshevCosine n θ = 0`; lines 104-106 restate only the `(0,1)` instance.
findings.fix: Remove this low-degree API lemma; callers can use `integral_chebyshevCosine_mul_chebyshevCosine_of_ne (m := 0) (n := 1)`.
findings.issue: `integral_chebyshevCosine_zero_mul_one` is a special-case duplicate of the off-diagonal theorem `integral_chebyshevCosine_mul_chebyshevCosine_of_ne`.

summary: The main cosine-transfer statements are at the intended Chebyshev/cosine level, but the file adds redundant low-degree integral lemmas after already proving the general diagonal and off-diagonal forms.
